prediction.reasoning: For an 18-day prediction of AON stock, I used a random walk model with drift based on typical large-cap insurance/professional services stock volatility. AON typically exhibits annual volatility around 25-30%. Using 27% annualized volatility, the 18-day standard deviation is approximately 2.55%. The point estimate remains at current price assuming efficient markets. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions: 50% CI uses ±0.67σ, 80% CI uses ±1.28σ, and 90% CI uses ±1.64σ multiplied by the 18-day volatility estimate.
